title: Propose ADR 0005 for M1 save container v1
summary: Produce the proposed Save Container v1 ADR for M1 map chunks, entity stores, jobs, reservations, random streams, command-log tail and migration boundaries.
acceptance: ADR-0005 is created with Status Proposed and covers alternatives, migration, rollback, test and performance implications
Container sections include MapChunks, EntityStores, JobsReservations, RandomStreams and CommandLogTail with explicit version fields
Load order includes rebuild of indexes and invariant validation before the first resumed tick
No external save data is trusted without validation boundaries

history.details: Proposed ADR-0005 Save Container v1; documented versioned M1 sections, untrusted validation boundary, load/rebuild/invariant order, migration/rollback, tests and performance implications; required checks passed.
